notes: Issue #44, investigated by Claude (Copilot budget exhausted). NO RECIPE AUTHORED — www.thaigov.go.th is BLOCKED by a Cloudflare interactive/managed challenge. Evidence: HTTP 403 with title 'Just a moment...' for BOTH the honest bot UA (5599 bytes) and a browser UA (5727 bytes); /robots.txt, /sitemap.xml, /sitemap_index.xml all return the same 403 challenge. Escalated to a REAL headless Chromium via Playwright (browser UA, en-US locale, 9s dwell): still 'Just a moment...', 2 anchors -> STILL CHALLENGED. Same taxonomy as mng_president / lbn_presidency / alb_president; needs a challenge-solving browser the engine deliberately does not ship. Not a user_agent problem. Corroborating: the IA capture list itself contains /cdn-cgi/challenge-platform paths, i.e. the Cloudflare challenge has been in front of this site for a while. WAYBACK IS THE VIABLE ROUTE and looks rich: CDX for thaigov.go.th/* returns ~3549 statuscode:200 captures spanning 1998-2026 (nearly every year), including an English news room (/en/news-room, 209) and genuine PM speech URLs, e.g. /asem/item/75924-keynote-address-by-her-excellency-prime-minister-yingluck-s and /asem/item/76957-speech-by-her-excellency-ms-yingluck-shinawatra-prime-minis, plus /announcement-2/item/<id>-<slug> and /aboutus/current/policy-statement. The Joomla-ish item/<id>-<slug> shape is a good link_pattern anchor. RECOMMEND a follow-up tha_thaigov_wayback.yml. country=Thailand; source_url=https://www.thaigov.go.th/en/news; source_name=thaigov.go.th; source_type=official_gov; region=Asia; iso3n=764; content_format=fulltext; leaders_covered=PM.

WAYBACK ALSO INVESTIGATED — NOT VIABLE, no recipe authored (researcher asked for both Thailand sources; royaloffice.th WAS done as tha_royaloffice_wayback, this one cannot be). The live site stays Cloudflare-blocked (see the row above). The archive has plenty of captures but they cannot be filtered to leader speeches: the dominant archived shape is /news/contents/details/<id> — 5903 statuscode:200 captures spanning 2017-2025 (2018:2596, 2019:1174, 2022:1215) — and it carries NO category signal in the URL, so listing.link_pattern cannot select PM items. Sampled pages confirm the problem: /news/contents/details/10001 is a MINISTRY OF PUBLIC HEALTH press release ('Permanent Secretary of Public Health instructs regional executives...'), /news/contents/details/100075 a ministry programme announcement; article bodies are only ~310-330 chars anyway (the biggest containers on the page are nav/menu chrome). The site's own nav DOES have PM-news and speech categories, but that taxonomy lives only in the page, not the URL, so the engine cannot use it. Same structural failure mode as bgd_bss_president_wayback and the Azerbaijan wayback test. Other shapes checked and rejected: /en/news-room/item/<id>-<slug> has real slugs but only ~13 captures; /asem/item/<id>-keynote-address-... (the Yingluck-era speech URLs seen in a domain-wide query) return 0 under a statuscode:200 prefix query, i.e. they are archived only as redirects; /aboutus/* is cabinet/biography pages, not speeches; the 2001-2006 era is /news/cab/<year>/cab*.htm cabinet minutes. CONCLUSION: Thailand's PM speeches need a DIFFERENT source or an engine feature that can filter by on-page category rather than URL. Leaving issue #44 open.
